   857	void Vector::DebugTransformToDictionary(Vector &vector, idx_t count) {
   858	        if (vector.GetVectorType() != VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR) {
   859	                // only supported for flat vectors currently
   860	                return;
   861	        }
   862	        // convert vector to dictionary vector
   863	        // first create an inverted vector of twice the size with NULL values every other value
   864	        // i.e. [1, 2, 3] is converted into [NULL, 3, NULL, 2, NULL, 1]
   865	        idx_t verify_count = count * 2;
   866	        SelectionVector inverted_sel(verify_count);
   867	        idx_t offset = 0;
   868	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   869	                idx_t current_index = count - i - 1;
   870	                inverted_sel.set_index(offset++, current_index);

     8	Vector &MapVector::GetKeys(Vector &vector) {
     9	        auto &entries = StructVector::GetEntries(ListVector::GetEntry(vector));
    10	        D_ASSERT(entries.size() == 2);
    11	        return entries[0];
    12	}

    25	
    26	MapInvalidReason MapVector::CheckMapValidity(Vector &map, idx_t count, const SelectionVector &sel) {
    27	        D_ASSERT(map.GetType().id() == LogicalTypeId::MAP);
    28	
    29	        // unify the MAP vector, which is a physical LIST vector
    30	        auto map_entries = map.Values<list_entry_t>(count);
    31	        auto maps_length = ListVector::GetListSize(map);
    32	
    33	        // unify the child vector containing the keys
    34	        auto &keys = MapVector::GetKeys(map);
    35	
    36	        auto key_validity = keys.Validity(maps_length);
    37	        for (idx_t row_idx = 0; row_idx < count; row_idx++) {
    38	                auto mapped_row = sel.get_index(row_idx);
    39	                auto map_entry = map_entries[mapped_row];
    40	                if (!map_entry.IsValid()) {
    41	                        continue;
    42	                }
    43	                auto &map_list = map_entry.GetValue();
    44	
    45	                value_set_t unique_keys;
    46	                auto length = map_list.length;
    47	                auto offset = map_list.offset;
    48	
    49	                for (idx_t child_idx = 0; child_idx < length; child_idx++) {
    50	                        if (!key_validity.IsValid(offset + child_idx)) {
    51	                                return MapInvalidReason::NULL_KEY;
    52	                        }
    53	
    54	                        auto value = keys.GetValue(offset + child_idx);
    55	                        auto unique = unique_keys.insert(value).second;
    56	                        if (!unique) {
    57	                                return MapInvalidReason::DUPLICATE_KEY;
    58	                        }
    59	                }
    60	        }
    61	
    62	        return MapInvalidReason::VALID;
    63	}
    64	
    65	void MapVector::MapConversionVerify(Vector &vector, idx_t count) {
    66	        auto reason = MapVector::CheckMapValidity(vector, count);
    67	        EvalMapInvalidReason(reason);
    68	}
    69	
    70	void MapVector::EvalMapInvalidReason(MapInvalidReason reason) {
    71	        switch (reason) {
    72	        case MapInvalidReason::VALID:
    73	                return;
    74	        case MapInvalidReason::DUPLICATE_KEY:
    75	                throw InvalidInputException("Map keys must be unique.");
    76	        case MapInvalidReason::NULL_KEY:
    77	                throw InvalidInputException("Map keys can not be NULL.");
    78	        case MapInvalidReason::NOT_ALIGNED:
    79	                throw InvalidInputException("The map key list does not align with the map value list.");
    80	        case MapInvalidReason::INVALID_PARAMS:
    81	                throw InvalidInputException("Invalid map argument(s). Valid map arguments are a list of key-value pairs (MAP "
    82	                                            "{'key1': 'val1', ...}), two lists (MAP ([1, 2], [10, 11])), or no arguments.");
    83	        default:
    84	                throw InternalException("MapInvalidReason not implemented");
    85	        }
    86	}
    87	
    88	} // namespace duckdb

    13	unique_ptr<BoundCastData> ArrayBoundCastData::BindArrayToArrayCast(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source,
    14	                                                                   const LogicalType &target) {
    15	        vector<BoundCastInfo> child_cast_info;
    16	        auto &source_child_type = ArrayType::GetChildType(source);
    17	        auto &result_child_type = ArrayType::GetChildType(target);
    18	        auto child_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_child_type, result_child_type);
    19	        return make_uniq<ArrayBoundCastData>(std::move(child_cast));
    20	}

    22	static unique_ptr<BoundCastData> BindArrayToListCast(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source,
    23	                                                     const LogicalType &target) {
    24	        D_ASSERT(source.id() == LogicalTypeId::ARRAY);
    25	        D_ASSERT(target.id() == LogicalTypeId::LIST);
    26

    29	        auto &result_child_type = ListType::GetChildType(target);
    30	        auto child_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_child_type, result_child_type);
    31	        return make_uniq<ArrayBoundCastData>(std::move(child_cast));

    34	unique_ptr<FunctionLocalState> ArrayBoundCastData::InitArrayLocalState(CastLocalStateParameters &parameters) {
    35	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<ArrayBoundCastData>();
    36	        if (!cast_data.child_cast_info.HasInitLocalState()) {
    37	                return nullptr;
    38	        }
    39	        CastLocalStateParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData());
    40	        return cast_data.child_cast_info.InitLocalState(child_parameters);
    41	}

    43	//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    44	// ARRAY -> ARRAY
    45	//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    46	static bool ArrayToArrayCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    47	        auto source_array_size = ArrayType::GetSize(source.GetType());
    48	        auto target_array_size = ArrayType::GetSize(result.GetType());
    49	        if (source_array_size != target_array_size) {
    50	                // Cant cast between arrays of different sizes
    51	                auto msg = StringUtil::Format("Cannot cast array of size %u to array of size %u", source_array_size,
    52	                                              target_array_size);
    53	                HandleCastError::AssignError(msg, parameters);
    54	                if (!parameters.strict) {
    55	                        // if this was a TRY_CAST, we know every row will fail, so just return null
    56	                        ConstantVector::SetNull(result);
    57	                        return false;
    58	                }
    59	        }
    60	
    61	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<ArrayBoundCastData>();
    62	        if (source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
    63	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
    64	
    65	                if (ConstantVector::IsNull(source)) {
    66	                        ConstantVector::SetNull(result);
    67	                }
    68	
    69	                auto &source_cc = ArrayVector::GetEntry(source);
    70	                auto &result_cc = ArrayVector::GetEntry(result);
    71	
    72	                // If the array vector is constant, the child vector must be flat (or constant if array size is 1)
    73	                D_ASSERT(source_cc.GetVectorType() == VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR || source_array_size == 1);
    74	
    75	                CastParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData(), parameters.local_state);
    76	                bool all_ok = cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(source_cc, result_cc, source_array_size, child_parameters);
    77	                return all_ok;
    78	        } else {
    79	                // Flatten if not constant
    80	                source.Flatten(count);
    81	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR);
    82	
    83	                FlatVector::SetValidity(result, FlatVector::ValidityMutable(source));
    84	                auto &source_cc = ArrayVector::GetEntry(source);
    85	                auto &result_cc = ArrayVector::GetEntry(result);
    86	
    87	                CastParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData(), parameters.local_state);
    88	                bool all_ok = cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(source_cc, result_cc, count * source_array_size, child_parameters);
    89	                return all_ok;
    90	        }
    91	}
    92	
    93	//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    94	// ARRAY -> VARCHAR
    95	//------------------------------------------------------------------------------
    96	static bool ArrayToVarcharCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    97	        auto is_constant = source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR;
    98	
    99	        auto size = ArrayType::GetSize(source.GetType());
   100	        Vector varchar_list(LogicalType::ARRAY(LogicalType::VARCHAR, size), count);
   101	        ArrayToArrayCast(source, varchar_list, count, parameters);
   102	
   103	        varchar_list.Flatten(count);
   104	        auto &validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(varchar_list);
   105	        auto &child = ArrayVector::GetEntry(varchar_list);
   106	        auto &child_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(child);
   107	
   108	        auto in_data = FlatVector::GetData<string_t>(child);
   109	        auto result_data = FlatVector::Writer<string_t>(result, count);
   110	
   111	        static constexpr const idx_t SEP_LENGTH = 2;
   112	        static constexpr const idx_t NULL_LENGTH = 4;
   113	
   114	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   115	                if (!validity.RowIsValid(i)) {
   116	                        result_data.SetInvalid(i);
   117	                        continue;
   118	                }
   119	
   120	                // First pass, compute the length
   121	                idx_t array_varchar_length = 2;
   122	                for (idx_t j = 0; j < size; j++) {
   123	                        auto elem_idx = (i * size) + j;
   124	                        auto elem = in_data[elem_idx];
   125	                        if (j > 0) {
   126	                                array_varchar_length += SEP_LENGTH;
   127	                        }
   128	                        array_varchar_length += child_validity.RowIsValid(elem_idx) ? elem.GetSize() : NULL_LENGTH;
   129	                }
   130	
   131	                auto &out_str = result_data[i].EmptyString(array_varchar_length);
   132	                auto dataptr = out_str.GetDataWriteable();
   133	                idx_t offset = 0;
   134	                dataptr[offset++] = '[';
   135	
   136	                // Second pass, write the actual data
   137	                for (idx_t j = 0; j < size; j++) {
   138	                        auto elem_idx = (i * size) + j;
   139	                        auto elem = in_data[elem_idx];
   140	                        if (j > 0) {

    12	unique_ptr<BoundCastData> MapBoundCastData::BindMapToMapCast(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source,
    13	                                                             const LogicalType &target) {
    14	        vector<BoundCastInfo> child_cast_info;
    15	        auto source_key = MapType::KeyType(source);
    16	        auto target_key = MapType::KeyType(target);
    17	        auto source_val = MapType::ValueType(source);
    18	        auto target_val = MapType::ValueType(target);
    19	        auto key_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_key, target_key);
    20	        auto value_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_val, target_val);
    21	        return make_uniq<MapBoundCastData>(std::move(key_cast), std::move(value_cast));
    22	}
    23	
    24	static bool MapToVarcharCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    25	        auto constant = source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR;
    26	        auto varchar_type = LogicalType::MAP(LogicalType::VARCHAR, LogicalType::VARCHAR);
    27	        Vector varchar_map(varchar_type, count);
    28	
    29	        // since map's physical type is a list, the ListCast can be utilized
    30	        ListCast::ListToListCast(source, varchar_map, count, parameters);
    31	
    32	        varchar_map.Flatten(count);
    33	        auto &validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(varchar_map);
    34	        auto &key_str = MapVector::GetKeys(varchar_map);
    35	        auto &val_str = MapVector::GetValues(varchar_map);
    36	
    37	        key_str.Flatten(ListVector::GetListSize(source));
    38	        val_str.Flatten(ListVector::GetListSize(source));
    39	
    40	        auto list_data = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(varchar_map);
    41	        auto key_data = FlatVector::GetData<string_t>(key_str);
    42	        auto val_data = FlatVector::GetData<string_t>(val_str);
    43	        auto &key_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(key_str);
    44	        auto &val_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(val_str);
    45	        auto &struct_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(ListVector::GetEntry(varchar_map));
    46	
    47	        //! {key=value[, ]}
    48	        static constexpr const idx_t SEP_LENGTH = 2;
    49	        static constexpr const idx_t KEY_VALUE_SEP_LENGTH = 1;
    50	        static constexpr const idx_t NULL_LENGTH = 4;
    51	        static constexpr const idx_t INVALID_LENGTH = 7;
    52	
    53	        auto &key_vec = MapVector::GetKeys(source);
    54	        auto &value_vec = MapVector::GetValues(source);
    55	
    56	        auto key_is_nested = key_vec.GetType().IsNested();
    57	        auto value_is_nested = value_vec.GetType().IsNested();
    58	
    59	        auto key_strlen_func = key_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::CalculateStringLength
    60	                                             : VectorCastHelpers::CalculateEscapedStringLength<false>;
    61	        auto key_write_func = key_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::WriteString : VectorCastHelpers::WriteEscapedString<false>;
    62	
    63	        auto value_strlen_func = value_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::CalculateStringLength
    64	                                                 : VectorCastHelpers::CalculateEscapedStringLength<false>;
    65	        auto value_write_func =
    66	            value_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::WriteString : VectorCastHelpers::WriteEscapedString<false>;
    67	
    68	        auto result_data = FlatVector::Writer<string_t>(result, count);
    69	        unsafe_unique_array<bool> key_needs_quotes;
    70	        unsafe_unique_array<bool> value_needs_quotes;
    71	        idx_t needs_quotes_length = DConstants::INVALID_INDEX;
    72	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    73	                if (!validity.RowIsValid(i)) {
    74	                        result_data.SetInvalid(i);
    75	                        continue;
    76	                }
    77	
    78	                idx_t string_length = 2; // {}
    79	                auto list = list_data[i];
    80	
    81	                if (!key_needs_quotes || list.length > needs_quotes_length) {
    82	                        key_needs_quotes = make_unsafe_uniq_array_uninitialized<bool>(list.length);
    83	                        value_needs_quotes = make_unsafe_uniq_array_uninitialized<bool>(list.length);
    84	                        needs_quotes_length = list.length;
    85	                }
    86	                for (idx_t list_idx = 0; list_idx < list.length; list_idx++) {
    87	                        if (list_idx > 0) {
    88	                                string_length += SEP_LENGTH;
    89	                        }
    90	
    91	                        auto idx = list.offset + list_idx;
    92	
    93	                        if (!struct_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
    94	                                string_length += NULL_LENGTH;
    95	                                continue;
    96	                        }
    97	                        if (!key_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
    98	                                // throw InternalException("Error in map: key validity invalid?!");
    99	                                string_length += INVALID_LENGTH;
   100	                                continue;
   101	                        }
   102	                        string_length += key_strlen_func(key_data[idx], key_needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   103	                        string_length += KEY_VALUE_SEP_LENGTH;
   104	                        if (val_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   105	                                string_length += value_strlen_func(val_data[idx], value_needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   106	                        } else {
   107	                                string_length += NULL_LENGTH;
   108	                        }
   109	                }
   110	                auto &result_str = result_data[i].EmptyString(string_length);
   111	                auto dataptr = result_str.GetDataWriteable();
   112	                idx_t offset = 0;
   113	
   114	                dataptr[offset++] = '{';
   115	                for (idx_t list_idx = 0; list_idx < list.length; list_idx++) {
   116	                        if (list_idx > 0) {
   117	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, ", ", SEP_LENGTH);
   118	                                offset += SEP_LENGTH;
   119	                        }
   120	
   121	                        auto idx = list.offset + list_idx;
   122	                        if (!struct_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   123	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, "NULL", NULL_LENGTH);
   124	                                offset += NULL_LENGTH;
   125	                                continue;
   126	                        }
   127	                        if (!key_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   128	                                // throw InternalException("Error in map: key validity invalid?!");
   129	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, "invalid", INVALID_LENGTH);
   130	                                offset += INVALID_LENGTH;
   131	                                continue;
   132	                        }
   133	                        offset += key_write_func(dataptr + offset, key_data[idx], key_needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   134	                        dataptr[offset++] = '=';
   135	                        if (val_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   136	                                offset += value_write_func(dataptr + offset, val_data[idx], value_needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   137	                        } else {
   138	                                memcpy(dataptr + offset, "NULL", NULL_LENGTH);
   139	                                offset += NULL_LENGTH;
   140	                        }
   141	                }
   142	                dataptr[offset++] = '}';
   143	                result_str.Finalize();
   144	        }
   145	
   146	        if (constant) {
   147	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
   148	        }
   149	        return true;
   150	}
   151	
   152	BoundCastInfo DefaultCasts::MapCastSwitch(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source, const LogicalType &target) {
   153	        switch (target.id()) {
   154	        case LogicalTypeId::MAP:
   155	                return BoundCastInfo(ListCast::ListToListCast, ListBoundCastData::BindListToListCast(input, source, target),
   156	                                     ListBoundCastData::InitListLocalState);
   157	        case LogicalTypeId::VARCHAR: {
   158	                auto varchar_type = LogicalType::MAP(LogicalType::VARCHAR, LogicalType::VARCHAR);
   159	                return BoundCastInfo(MapToVarcharCast, ListBoundCastData::BindListToListCast(input, source, varchar_type),
   160	                                     ListBoundCastData::InitListLocalState);
   161	        }
   162	        default:
   163	                return TryVectorNullCast;
   164	        }
   165	}
   166	
   167	} // namespace duckdb

    14	unique_ptr<BoundCastData> ListBoundCastData::BindListToListCast(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source,
    15	                                                                const LogicalType &target) {
    16	        vector<BoundCastInfo> child_cast_info;
    17	        auto &source_child_type = ListType::GetChildType(source);
    18	        auto &result_child_type = ListType::GetChildType(target);
    19	        auto child_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_child_type, result_child_type);
    20	        return make_uniq<ListBoundCastData>(std::move(child_cast));
    21	}
    22	
    23	static unique_ptr<BoundCastData> BindListToArrayCast(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source,
    24	                                                     const LogicalType &target) {
    25	        vector<BoundCastInfo> child_cast_info;
    26	        auto &source_child_type = ListType::GetChildType(source);
    27	        auto &result_child_type = ArrayType::GetChildType(target);
    28	        auto child_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_child_type, result_child_type);
    29	        return make_uniq<ListBoundCastData>(std::move(child_cast));
    30	}
    31	
    32	unique_ptr<FunctionLocalState> ListBoundCastData::InitListLocalState(CastLocalStateParameters &parameters) {
    33	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<ListBoundCastData>();
    34	        if (!cast_data.child_cast_info.HasInitLocalState()) {
    35	                return nullptr;
    36	        }
    37	        CastLocalStateParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData());
    38	        return cast_data.child_cast_info.InitLocalState(child_parameters);
    39	}
    40	
    41	bool ListCast::ListToListCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    42	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<ListBoundCastData>();
    43	
    44	        // only handle constant and flat vectors here for now
    45	        if (source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
    46	                result.SetVectorType(source.GetVectorType());
    47	                const bool is_null = ConstantVector::IsNull(source);
    48	                ConstantVector::SetNull(result, is_null);
    49	
    50	                if (!is_null) {
    51	                        auto ldata = ConstantVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
    52	                        auto tdata = ConstantVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(result);
    53	                        *tdata = *ldata;
    54	                }
    55	        } else {
    56	                source.Flatten(count);
    57	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR);
    58	                FlatVector::SetValidity(result, FlatVector::ValidityMutable(source));
    59	
    60	                auto ldata = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
    61	                auto tdata = FlatVector::Writer<list_entry_t>(result, count);
    62	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    63	                        tdata[i] = ldata[i];
    64	                }
    65	        }
    66	        auto &source_cc = ListVector::GetEntry(source);
    67	        auto source_size = ListVector::GetListSize(source);
    68	
    69	        ListVector::Reserve(result, source_size);
    70	        auto &append_vector = ListVector::GetEntry(result);
    71	
    72	        CastParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData(), parameters.local_state);
    73	        bool all_succeeded = cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(source_cc, append_vector, source_size, child_parameters);
    74	        ListVector::SetListSize(result, source_size);
    75	        D_ASSERT(ListVector::GetListSize(result) == source_size);
    76	        return all_succeeded;
    77	}
    78	
    79	static bool ListToVarcharCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    80	        // first cast the child vector to varchar
    81	        Vector varchar_list(LogicalType::LIST(LogicalType::VARCHAR), count);
    82	        ListCast::ListToListCast(source, varchar_list, count, parameters);
    83	
    84	        auto &child_vec = ListVector::GetEntry(source);
    85	        auto child_is_nested = child_vec.GetType().IsNested();
    86	        auto string_length_func = child_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::CalculateStringLength
    87	                                                  : VectorCastHelpers::CalculateEscapedStringLength<false>;
    88	        auto write_string_func =
    89	            child_is_nested ? VectorCastHelpers::WriteString : VectorCastHelpers::WriteEscapedString<false>;
    90	
    91	        // now construct the actual varchar vector
    92	        varchar_list.Flatten(count);
    93	        auto &child = ListVector::GetEntry(varchar_list);
    94	        auto list_data = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(varchar_list);
    95	        auto &validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(varchar_list);
    96	
    97	        child.Flatten(ListVector::GetListSize(varchar_list));
    98	        auto child_data = FlatVector::GetData<string_t>(child);
    99	        auto &child_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(child);
   100	
   101	        static constexpr const idx_t SEP_LENGTH = 2;
   102	        static constexpr const idx_t NULL_LENGTH = 4;
   103	        unsafe_unique_array<bool> needs_quotes;
   104	        idx_t needs_quotes_length = DConstants::INVALID_INDEX;
   105	
   106	        auto result_data = FlatVector::Writer<string_t>(result, count);
   107	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   108	                if (!validity.RowIsValid(i)) {
   109	                        result_data.SetInvalid(i);
   110	                        continue;
   111	                }
   112	                auto list = list_data[i];
   113	                // figure out how long the result needs to be
   114	                idx_t list_length = 2; // "[" and "]"
   115	                if (!needs_quotes || list.length > needs_quotes_length) {
   116	                        needs_quotes = make_unsafe_uniq_array_uninitialized<bool>(list.length);
   117	                        needs_quotes_length = list.length;
   118	                }
   119	                for (idx_t list_idx = 0; list_idx < list.length; list_idx++) {
   120	                        auto idx = list.offset + list_idx;
   121	                        if (list_idx > 0) {
   122	                                list_length += SEP_LENGTH; // ", "
   123	                        }
   124	                        // string length, or "NULL"
   125	                        if (child_validity.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   126	                                list_length += string_length_func(child_data[idx], needs_quotes[list_idx]);
   127	                        } else {
   128	                                list_length += NULL_LENGTH;
   129	                        }
   130	                }

    35	bool DefaultCasts::NopCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    36	        result.Reference(source);
    37	        return true;

    40	void HandleCastError::AssignError(const string &error_message, CastParameters &parameters) {
    41	        AssignError(error_message, parameters.error_message, parameters.cast_source, parameters.query_location);
    42	}
    43	
    44	void HandleCastError::AssignError(const string &error_message, string *error_message_ptr,
    45	                                  optional_ptr<const Expression> cast_source, optional_idx error_location) {
    46	        string column;
    47	        if (cast_source && cast_source->HasAlias()) {
    48	                column = " when casting from source column " + cast_source->alias;
    49	        }
    50	        if (!error_message_ptr) {
    51	                throw ConversionException(error_location, error_message + column);
    52	        }
    53	        if (error_message_ptr->empty()) {
    54	                *error_message_ptr = error_message + column;
    55	        }
    56	}
    57	
    58	// NULL cast only works if all values in source are NULL, otherwise an unimplemented cast exception is thrown
    59	bool DefaultCasts::TryVectorNullCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    60	        bool success = true;
    61	        if (VectorOperations::HasNotNull(source, count)) {
    62	                HandleCastError::AssignError(TryCast::UnimplementedCastMessage(source.GetType(), result.GetType()), parameters);
    63	                success = false;
    64	        }
    65	        ConstantVector::SetNull(result);
    66	        return success;
    67	}
    68	
    69	bool DefaultCasts::ReinterpretCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    70	        result.Reinterpret(source);
    71	        return true;
    72	}
    73	
    74	static bool AggregateStateToBlobCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    75	        if (result.GetType().id() != LogicalTypeId::BLOB) {
    76	                throw TypeMismatchException(source.GetType(), result.GetType(),
    77	                                            "Cannot cast LEGACY_AGGREGATE_STATE to anything but BLOB");
    78	        }
    79	        result.Reinterpret(source);
    80	        return true;
    81	}
    82	
    83	static bool AggregateStateToStructReinterpret(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    84	        // Both `AGGREGATE_STATE` and `STRUCT` are `PhysicalType::STRUCT`
    85	        // However, we can't use Reinterpret because it's blocked by D_ASSERT for nested types
    86	        // Instead, we manually reference the entries
    87	        auto &source_entries = StructVector::GetEntries(source);
    88	        auto &result_entries = StructVector::GetEntries(result);
    89	
    90	        D_ASSERT(source_entries.size() == result_entries.size());

   153	
   154	static bool ListToArrayCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
   155	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<ListBoundCastData>();
   156	        auto array_size = ArrayType::GetSize(result.GetType());
   157	
   158	        // only handle constant and flat vectors here for now
   159	        if (source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
   160	                result.SetVectorType(source.GetVectorType());
   161	                if (ConstantVector::IsNull(source)) {
   162	                        ConstantVector::SetNull(result);
   163	                        return true;
   164	                }
   165	
   166	                auto ldata = ConstantVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source)[0];
   167	                if (!ConstantVector::IsNull(source) && ldata.length != array_size) {
   168	                        // Cant cast to array, list size mismatch
   169	                        auto msg = StringUtil::Format("Cannot cast list with length %llu to array with length %u", ldata.length,
   170	                                                      array_size);
   171	                        HandleCastError::AssignError(msg, parameters);
   172	                        ConstantVector::SetNull(result);
   173	                        return false;
   174	                }
   175	
   176	                auto &source_cc = ListVector::GetEntry(source);
   177	                auto &result_cc = ArrayVector::GetEntry(result);
   178	
   179	                CastParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData(), parameters.local_state);
   180	
   181	                if (ldata.offset == 0) {
   182	                        // Fast path: offset is zero, we can just cast `array_size` elements of the child vectors directly
   183	                        // Since the list was constant, there can only be one sequence of data in the child vector
   184	                        return cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(source_cc, result_cc, array_size, child_parameters);
   185	                }
   186	
   187	                // Else, we need to copy the range we want to cast to a new vector and cast that
   188	                // In theory we could slice the source child to create a dictionary, but we would then have to flatten the
   189	                // result child which is going to allocate a temp vector and perform a copy anyway. Since we just want to copy a
   190	                // single contiguous range with a single offset, this is simpler.
   191	
   192	                Vector payload_vector(source_cc.GetType(), array_size);
   193	                VectorOperations::Copy(source_cc, payload_vector, ldata.offset + array_size, ldata.offset, 0);
   194	                return cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(payload_vector, result_cc, array_size, child_parameters);
   195	
   196	        } else {
   197	                source.Flatten(count);
   198	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR);
   199	
   200	                auto child_type = ArrayType::GetChildType(result.GetType());
   201	                auto &source_cc = ListVector::GetEntry(source);
   202	                auto &result_cc = ArrayVector::GetEntry(result);
   203	                auto ldata = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
   204	
   205	                auto child_count = array_size * count;
   206	                SelectionVector child_sel(child_count);
   207	
   208	                bool all_ok = true;
   209	
   210	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   211	                        if (FlatVector::IsNull(source, i)) {
   212	                                FlatVector::SetNull(result, i, true);
   213	                                for (idx_t array_elem = 0; array_elem < array_size; array_elem++) {
   214	                                        FlatVector::SetNull(result_cc, i * array_size + array_elem, true);
   215	                                        child_sel.set_index(i * array_size + array_elem, 0);
   216	                                }
   217	                        } else if (ldata[i].length != array_size) {
   218	                                if (all_ok) {
   219	                                        all_ok = false;
   220	                                        auto msg = StringUtil::Format("Cannot cast list with length %llu to array with length %u",
   221	                                                                      ldata[i].length, array_size);
   222	                                        HandleCastError::AssignError(msg, parameters);
   223	                                }
   224	                                FlatVector::SetNull(result, i, true);
   225	                                for (idx_t array_elem = 0; array_elem < array_size; array_elem++) {
   226	                                        FlatVector::SetNull(result_cc, i * array_size + array_elem, true);
   227	                                        child_sel.set_index(i * array_size + array_elem, 0);
   228	                                }
   229	                        } else {
   230	                                for (idx_t array_elem = 0; array_elem < array_size; array_elem++) {
   231	                                        child_sel.set_index(i * array_size + array_elem, ldata[i].offset + array_elem);
   232	                                }
   233	                        }
   234	                }
   235	
   236	                CastParameters child_parameters(parameters, cast_data.child_cast_info.GetCastData(), parameters.local_state);
   237	
   238	                // Fast path: No lists are null
   239	                // We can just cast the child vector directly
   240	                // Note: Its worth doing a CheckAllValid here, the slow path is significantly more expensive
   241	                if (FlatVector::ValidityMutable(result).CheckAllValid(count)) {
   242	                        Vector payload_vector(result_cc.GetType(), child_count);
   243	
   244	                        bool ok = cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(source_cc, payload_vector, child_count, child_parameters);
   245	                        if (all_ok && !ok) {
   246	                                all_ok = false;
   247	                                HandleCastError::AssignError(*child_parameters.error_message, parameters);
   248	                        }
   249	                        // Now do the actual copy onto the result vector, making sure to slice properly in case the lists are out of
   250	                        // order
   251	                        VectorOperations::Copy(payload_vector, result_cc, child_sel, child_count, 0, 0);
   252	                        return all_ok;
   253	                }
   254	
   255	                // Slow path: Some lists are null, so we need to copy the data list by list to the right place
   256	                auto list_data = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
   257	                DataChunk cast_chunk;
   258	                cast_chunk.Initialize(Allocator::DefaultAllocator(), {source_cc.GetType(), result_cc.GetType()}, array_size);
   259	
   260	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   261	                        if (FlatVector::IsNull(result, i)) {
   262	                                // We've already failed to cast this list above (e.g. length mismatch), so theres nothing to do here.
   263	                                continue;
   264	                        } else {
   265	                                auto &list_cast_input = cast_chunk.data[0];
   266	                                auto &list_cast_output = cast_chunk.data[1];
   267	                                auto list_entry = list_data[i];
   268	
   269	                                VectorOperations::Copy(source_cc, list_cast_input, list_entry.offset + array_size, list_entry.offset,
   270	                                                       0);
   271	
   272	                                bool ok =
   273	                                    cast_data.child_cast_info.Cast(list_cast_input, list_cast_output, array_size, child_parameters);
   274	                                if (all_ok && !ok) {
   275	                                        all_ok = false;
   276	                                        HandleCastError::AssignError(*child_parameters.error_message, parameters);
   277	                                }
   278	                                VectorOperations::Copy(list_cast_output, result_cc, array_size, 0, i * array_size);
   279	
   280	                                // Reset the cast_chunk
   281	                                cast_chunk.Reset();
   282	                        }
   283	                }
   284	
   285	                return all_ok;

     1	//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
     2	//                         DuckDB
     3	//
     4	// duckdb/function/cast/default_casts.hpp
     5	//
     6	//
     7	//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
     8	
     9	#pragma once
    10	
    11	#include "duckdb/common/types.hpp"
    12	#include "duckdb/common/types/vector.hpp"
    13	#include "duckdb/common/helper.hpp"
    14	#include "duckdb/common/optional_ptr.hpp"
    15	#include "duckdb/function/scalar_function.hpp"
    16	
    17	namespace duckdb {
    18	
    19	class CastFunctionSet;
    20	struct FunctionLocalState;
    21	
    22	//! Extra data that can be attached to a bind function of a cast, and is available during binding
    23	struct BindCastInfo {
    24	        DUCKDB_API virtual ~BindCastInfo();
    25	
    26	        template <class TARGET>
    27	        TARGET &Cast() {
    28	                DynamicCastCheck<TARGET>(this);
    29	                return reinterpret_cast<TARGET &>(*this);
    30	        }
    31	        template <class TARGET>
    32	        const TARGET &Cast() const {
    33	                DynamicCastCheck<TARGET>(this);
    34	                return reinterpret_cast<const TARGET &>(*this);
    35	        }
    36	};
    37	
    38	//! Extra data that can be returned by the bind of a cast, and is available during execution of a cast
    39	struct BoundCastData {
    40	        DUCKDB_API virtual ~BoundCastData();
    41	
    42	        DUCKDB_API virtual unique_ptr<BoundCastData> Copy() const = 0;
    43	
    44	        template <class TARGET>
    45	        TARGET &Cast() {
    46	                DynamicCastCheck<TARGET>(this);
    47	                return reinterpret_cast<TARGET &>(*this);
    48	        }
    49	        template <class TARGET>
    50	        const TARGET &Cast() const {
    51	                DynamicCastCheck<TARGET>(this);
    52	                return reinterpret_cast<const TARGET &>(*this);
    53	        }
    54	};
    55	
    56	struct CastParameters {
    57	        CastParameters() {
    58	        }
    59	        CastParameters(bool strict, string *error_message) : CastParameters(nullptr, strict, error_message, nullptr) {
    60	        }
    61	        CastParameters(optional_ptr<BoundCastData> cast_data, bool strict, string *error_message,
    62	                       optional_ptr<FunctionLocalState> local_state, bool nullify_parent_p = false)
    63	            : cast_data(cast_data), strict(strict), error_message(error_message), local_state(local_state),
    64	              nullify_parent(nullify_parent_p) {
    65	        }
    66	        CastParameters(CastParameters &parent, optional_ptr<BoundCastData> cast_data,
    67	                       optional_ptr<FunctionLocalState> local_state)
    68	            : cast_data(cast_data), strict(parent.strict), error_message(parent.error_message), local_state(local_state),
    69	              query_location(parent.query_location) {
    70	        }
    71	
    72	        //! The bound cast data (if any)
    73	        optional_ptr<BoundCastData> cast_data;
    74	        //! whether or not to enable strict casting
    75	        bool strict = false;
    76	        // out: error message in case cast has failed
    77	        string *error_message = nullptr;
    78	        //! Source expression
    79	        optional_ptr<const Expression> cast_source;
    80	        //! Target expression
    81	        optional_ptr<const Expression> cast_target;
    82	        //! Local state
    83	        optional_ptr<FunctionLocalState> local_state;
    84	        //! Query location (if any)
    85	        optional_idx query_location;
    86	        //! In the case of a nested type, when facing a cast error, if we nullify the parent
    87	        bool nullify_parent = false;
    88	};
    89	
    90	struct CastLocalStateParameters {
    91	        CastLocalStateParameters(optional_ptr<ClientContext> context_p, optional_ptr<BoundCastData> cast_data_p)
    92	            : context(context_p), cast_data(cast_data_p) {
    93	        }
    94	        CastLocalStateParameters(ClientContext &context_p, optional_ptr<BoundCastData> cast_data_p)
    95	            : context(&context_p), cast_data(cast_data_p) {
    96	        }
    97	        CastLocalStateParameters(CastLocalStateParameters &parent, optional_ptr<BoundCastData> cast_data_p)
    98	            : context(parent.context), cast_data(cast_data_p) {
    99	        }
   100	
   101	        optional_ptr<ClientContext> context;
   102	        //! The bound cast data (if any)
   103	        optional_ptr<BoundCastData> cast_data;
   104	};
   105	
   106	typedef bool (*cast_function_t)(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters);
   107	typedef unique_ptr<FunctionLocalState> (*init_cast_local_state_t)(CastLocalStateParameters &parameters);
   108	
   109	struct BoundCastInfo {
   110	        DUCKDB_API
   111	        BoundCastInfo( // NOLINT: allow explicit cast from cast_function_t
   112	            cast_function_t function, unique_ptr<BoundCastData> cast_data = nullptr,
   113	            init_cast_local_state_t init_local_state = nullptr);
   114	
   115	        bool Cast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) const {
   116	                return function(source, result, count, parameters);
   117	        }
   118	
   119	public:
   120	        BoundCastInfo Copy() const;

   167	                                        break;

   169	                        }
   170	                }
   171	        }
   172	        return all_converted;

     7	namespace duckdb {
     8	
     9	bool VectorOperations::TryCast(CastFunctionSet &set, GetCastFunctionInput &input, Vector &source, Vector &result,
    10	                               idx_t count, string *error_message, bool strict, const bool nullify_parent) {
    11	        auto cast_function = set.GetCastFunction(source.GetType(), result.GetType(), input);
    12	        unique_ptr<FunctionLocalState> local_state;
    13	        if (cast_function.HasInitLocalState()) {
    14	                CastLocalStateParameters lparameters(input.context, cast_function.GetCastData());
    15	                local_state = cast_function.InitLocalState(lparameters);
    16	        }
    17	        CastParameters parameters(cast_function.GetCastData().get(), strict, error_message, local_state.get(),
    18	                                  nullify_parent);
    19	        return cast_function.Cast(source, result, count, parameters);
    20	}
    21	
    22	bool VectorOperations::DefaultTryCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, string *error_message, bool strict) {
    23	        CastFunctionSet set;
    24	        GetCastFunctionInput input;
    25	        return VectorOperations::TryCast(set, input, source, result, count, error_message, strict);
    26	}
    27	
    28	void VectorOperations::DefaultCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, bool strict) {
    29	        VectorOperations::DefaultTryCast(source, result, count, nullptr, strict);
    30	}
    31	
    32	bool VectorOperations::TryCast(ClientContext &context, Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count,
    33	                               string *error_message, bool strict, const bool nullify_parent) {
    34	        auto &config = DBConfig::GetConfig(context);
    35	        auto &set = config.GetCastFunctions();
    36	        GetCastFunctionInput get_input(context);
    37	        return VectorOperations::TryCast(set, get_input, source, result, count, error_message, strict, nullify_parent);
    38	}
    39	
    40	void VectorOperations::Cast(ClientContext &context, Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, bool strict) {
    41	        VectorOperations::TryCast(context, source, result, count, nullptr, strict);
    42	}
    43	
    44	} // namespace duckdb

  2015	bool Value::TryCastAs(CastFunctionSet &set, GetCastFunctionInput &get_input, const LogicalType &target_type,
  2016	                      Value &new_value, string *error_message, bool strict) const {
  2017	        if (type_ == target_type) {
  2018	                new_value = Copy();
  2019	                return true;
  2020	        }
  2021	        Vector input(*this);
  2022	        Vector result(target_type);
  2023	        if (!VectorOperations::TryCast(set, get_input, input, result, 1, error_message, strict)) {
  2024	                return false;
  2025	        }
  2026	        new_value = result.GetValue(0);
  2027	        return true;
  2028	}

  2031	                      bool strict) const {
  2032	        GetCastFunctionInput get_input(context);
  2033	        return TryCastAs(CastFunctionSet::Get(context), get_input, target_type, new_value, error_message, strict);

    13	namespace duckdb {
    14	
    15	unique_ptr<BoundCastData> StructBoundCastData::BindStructToStructCast(BindCastInput &input, const LogicalType &source,
    16	                                                                      const LogicalType &target) {
    17	        vector<BoundCastInfo> child_cast_info;
    18	        auto &source_children = StructType::GetChildTypes(source);
    19	        auto &target_children = StructType::GetChildTypes(target);
    20	
    21	        auto target_is_unnamed = target_children.empty() || StructType::IsUnnamed(target);
    22	        auto source_is_unnamed = source_children.empty() || StructType::IsUnnamed(source);
    23	
    24	        auto is_unnamed = target_is_unnamed || source_is_unnamed;
    25	        if (is_unnamed && source_children.size() != target_children.size()) {
    26	                throw TypeMismatchException(input.query_location, source, target, "Cannot cast STRUCTs of different size");
    27	        }
    28	
    29	        InsertionOrderPreservingMap<idx_t> target_children_map;
    30	        if (!is_unnamed) {
    31	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < target_children.size(); i++) {
    32	                        auto &name = target_children[i].first;
    33	                        if (target_children_map.find(name) != target_children_map.end()) {
    34	                                throw NotImplementedException("Error while casting - duplicate name \"%s\" in struct", name);
    35	                        }
    36	                        target_children_map[name] = i;
    37	                }
    38	        }
    39	
    40	        vector<idx_t> source_indexes;
    41	        vector<idx_t> target_indexes;
    42	        vector<idx_t> target_null_indexes;
    43	        bool has_any_match = is_unnamed;
    44	
    45	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < source_children.size(); i++) {
    46	                auto &source_child = source_children[i];
    47	                auto target_idx = i;
    48	
    49	                // Map to the correct index for names structs.
    50	                if (!is_unnamed) {
    51	                        auto target_child = target_children_map.find(source_child.first);
    52	                        if (target_child == target_children_map.end()) {
    53	                                // Skip any children that have no target.
    54	                                continue;
    55	                        }
    56	                        target_idx = target_child->second;
    57	                        target_children_map.erase(target_child);
    58	                        has_any_match = true;
    59	                }
    60	
    61	                source_indexes.push_back(i);
    62	                target_indexes.push_back(target_idx);
    63	                auto child_cast = input.GetCastFunction(source_child.second, target_children[target_idx].second);
    64	                child_cast_info.push_back(std::move(child_cast));
    65	        }
    66	
    67	        if (!has_any_match) {
    68	                throw BinderException("STRUCT to STRUCT cast must have at least one matching member");
    69	        }
    70	
    71	        // The remaining target children have no match in the source struct.
    72	        // Thus, they become NULL.
    73	        for (const auto &target_child : target_children_map) {
    74	                target_null_indexes.push_back(target_child.second);
    75	        }
    76	
    77	        return make_uniq<StructBoundCastData>(std::move(child_cast_info), target, std::move(source_indexes),
    78	                                              std::move(target_indexes), std::move(target_null_indexes));
    79	}
    80	
    81	unique_ptr<FunctionLocalState> StructBoundCastData::InitStructCastLocalState(CastLocalStateParameters &parameters) {
    82	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<StructBoundCastData>();
    83	        auto result = make_uniq<StructCastLocalState>();
    84	
    85	        for (auto &entry : cast_data.child_cast_info) {
    86	                unique_ptr<FunctionLocalState> child_state;
    87	                if (entry.HasInitLocalState()) {
    88	                        CastLocalStateParameters child_params(parameters, entry.GetCastData());
    89	                        child_state = entry.InitLocalState(child_params);
    90	                }
    91	                result->local_states.push_back(std::move(child_state));
    92	        }
    93	        return std::move(result);
    94	}
    95	
    96	static bool StructToStructCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
    97	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<StructBoundCastData>();
    98	        auto &l_state = parameters.local_state->Cast<StructCastLocalState>();
    99	
   100	        auto &source_vectors = StructVector::GetEntries(source);
   101	        auto &target_children = StructVector::GetEntries(result);
   102	
   103	        bool all_converted = true;
   104	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < cast_data.source_indexes.size(); i++) {
   105	                auto source_idx = cast_data.source_indexes[i];
   106	                auto target_idx = cast_data.target_indexes[i];
   107	
   108	                auto &source_vector = source_vectors[source_idx];
   109	                auto &target_vector = target_children[target_idx];
   110	
   111	                auto &child_cast_info = cast_data.child_cast_info[i];
   112	                CastParameters child_parameters(parameters, child_cast_info.GetCastData(), l_state.local_states[i]);
   113	                auto success = child_cast_info.Cast(source_vector, target_vector, count, child_parameters);
   114	                if (!success) {
   115	                        all_converted = false;
   116	                }
   117	        }
   118	
   119	        if (!cast_data.target_null_indexes.empty()) {
   120	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < cast_data.target_null_indexes.size(); i++) {
   121	                        auto target_idx = cast_data.target_null_indexes[i];
   122	                        auto &target_vector = target_children[target_idx];
   123	
   124	                        ConstantVector::SetNull(target_vector);
   125	                }
   126	        }
   127	
   128	        if (source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
   129	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
   130	                ConstantVector::SetNull(result, ConstantVector::IsNull(source));
   131	                return all_converted;
   132	        }
   133	
   134	        source.Flatten(count);
   135	        auto &result_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(result);
   136	        result_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(source);
   137	        result.Verify(count);
   138	        return all_converted;
   139	}
   140	
   141	static bool StructToVarcharCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
   142	        auto constant = source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR;
   143	        // first cast all child elements to varchar
   144	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<StructBoundCastData>();
   145	        Vector varchar_struct(cast_data.target, count);
   146	        StructToStructCast(source, varchar_struct, count, parameters);
   147	        auto &base_children = StructVector::GetEntries(source);
   148	
   149	        // now construct the actual varchar vector
   150	        varchar_struct.Flatten(count);

    16	struct VectorTryCastData {
    17	        VectorTryCastData(Vector &result_p, CastParameters &parameters) : result(result_p), parameters(parameters) {
    18	        }
    19	
    20	        Vector &result;
    21	        CastParameters &parameters;
    22	        bool all_converted = true;
    23	};
    24	
    25	struct HandleVectorCastError {
    26	        template <class RESULT_TYPE, class MASK_TYPE>
    27	        static RESULT_TYPE Operation(const string &error_message, MASK_TYPE &mask, idx_t idx,
    28	                                     VectorTryCastData &cast_data) {
    29	                HandleCastError::AssignError(error_message, cast_data.parameters);
    30	                cast_data.all_converted = false;
    31	                mask.SetInvalid(idx);
    32	                return NullValue<RESULT_TYPE>();
    33	        }
    34	};

    37	class VectorIterator {
    38	public:
    39	        VectorIterator(const Vector &vector, idx_t count) : count(count) {
    40	                vector.ToUnifiedFormat(count, format);
    41	                data = UnifiedVectorFormat::GetData<T>(format);
    42	        }
    43	
    44	public:
    45	        struct ValueEntry {
    46	                ValueEntry(const UnifiedVectorFormat &format, const T *data, idx_t index)
    47	                    : format(format), data(data), index(index) {
    48	                        sel_index = format.sel->get_index(index);
    49	                }
    50	
    51	                //! Return the data - the value must be valid
    52	                const T &GetValue() const {
    53	                        D_ASSERT(IsValid());
    54	                        return GetValueUnsafe();
    55	                }
    56	                //! Return the underlying data. If the data is not valid then uninitialized memory is returned.
    57	                const T &GetValueUnsafe() const {
    58	                        return data[sel_index];
    59	                }
    60	                bool IsValid() const {
    61	                        return format.validity.RowIsValid(sel_index);
    62	                }

     1	//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
     2	//                         DuckDB
     3	//
     4	// duckdb/common/types/selection_vector.hpp
     5	//
     6	//
     7	//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
     8	
     9	#pragma once
    10	
    11	#include "duckdb/common/allocator.hpp"
    12	#include "duckdb/common/common.hpp"
    13	#include "duckdb/common/numeric_utils.hpp"
    14	#include "duckdb/common/types.hpp"
    15	#include "duckdb/common/vector_size.hpp"
    16	
    17	namespace duckdb {
    18	class VectorBuffer;
    19	
    20	struct SelectionData {
    21	        DUCKDB_API explicit SelectionData(idx_t count);
    22	
    23	        AllocatedData owned_data;
    24	};
    25	
    26	struct SelectionVector {
    27	        SelectionVector() : sel_vector(nullptr) {
    28	        }
    29	        explicit SelectionVector(sel_t *sel) {
    30	                Initialize(sel);
    31	        }
    32	        explicit SelectionVector(idx_t count) {
    33	                Initialize(count);
    34	        }
    35	        SelectionVector(idx_t start, idx_t count) {
    36	                Initialize(MaxValue<idx_t>(count, STANDARD_VECTOR_SIZE));
    37	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    38	                        set_index(i, start + i);
    39	                }
    40	        }
    41	        SelectionVector(const SelectionVector &sel_vector) {
    42	                Initialize(sel_vector);
    43	        }
    44	        SelectionVector(SelectionVector &&other) noexcept
    45	            : sel_vector(other.sel_vector), selection_data(std::move(other.selection_data)) {
    46	                other.sel_vector = nullptr;
    47	        }
    48	        explicit SelectionVector(buffer_ptr<SelectionData> data) {
    49	                Initialize(std::move(data));
    50	        }
    51	        SelectionVector &operator=(SelectionVector &&other) noexcept {
    52	                sel_vector = other.sel_vector;
    53	                other.sel_vector = nullptr;
    54	                selection_data = std::move(other.selection_data);
    55	                return *this;
    56	        }
    57	
    58	public:
    59	        static idx_t Inverted(const SelectionVector &src, SelectionVector &dst, idx_t source_size, idx_t count) {
    60	                idx_t src_idx = 0;
    61	                idx_t dst_idx = 0;
    62	                for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    63	                        if (src_idx < source_size && src.get_index(src_idx) == i) {
    64	                                src_idx++;
    65	                                // This index is selected by 'src', skip it in 'dst'
    66	                                continue;
    67	                        }
    68	                        // This index does not exist in 'src', add it to the selection of 'dst'
    69	                        dst.set_index(dst_idx++, i);
    70	                }
    71	                return dst_idx;
    72	        }
    73	
    74	        void Initialize(sel_t *sel) {
    75	                selection_data.reset();
    76	                sel_vector = sel;
    77	        }
    78	        void Initialize(idx_t count = STANDARD_VECTOR_SIZE) {
    79	                selection_data = make_shared_ptr<SelectionData>(count);
    80	                sel_vector = reinterpret_cast<sel_t *>(selection_data->owned_data.get());

     1	#include "duckdb/common/vector_operations/vector_operations.hpp"
     2	#include "duckdb/execution/expression_executor.hpp"
     3	#include "duckdb/function/scalar_function.hpp"
     4	#include "duckdb/planner/expression/bound_cast_expression.hpp"
     5	
     6	namespace duckdb {
     7	
     8	unique_ptr<ExpressionState> ExpressionExecutor::InitializeState(const BoundCastExpression &expr,
     9	                                                                ExpressionExecutorState &root) {
    10	        auto result = make_uniq<ExecuteFunctionState>(expr, root);
    11	        result->AddChild(*expr.child);
    12	        result->Finalize();
    13	
    14	        if (expr.bound_cast.HasInitLocalState()) {
    15	                auto context_ptr = root.executor->HasContext() ? &root.executor->GetContext() : nullptr;
    16	                CastLocalStateParameters parameters(context_ptr, expr.bound_cast.GetCastData());
    17	                result->local_state = expr.bound_cast.InitLocalState(parameters);
    18	        }
    19	        return std::move(result);
    20	}
    21	
    22	void ExpressionExecutor::Execute(const BoundCastExpression &expr, ExpressionState *state, const SelectionVector *sel,
    23	                                 idx_t count, Vector &result) {
    24	        auto lstate = ExecuteFunctionState::GetFunctionState(*state);
    25	
    26	        // resolve the child
    27	        state->intermediate_chunk.Reset();
    28	
    29	        auto &child = state->intermediate_chunk.data[0];
    30	        auto child_state = state->child_states[0].get();
    31	
    32	        Execute(*expr.child, child_state, sel, count, child);
    33	
    34	        string error_message;
    35	        auto error_ref = expr.try_cast ? &error_message : nullptr;
    36	        CastParameters parameters(expr.bound_cast.GetCastData(), false, error_ref, lstate);
    37	        parameters.query_location = expr.GetQueryLocation();
    38	        parameters.cast_source = expr.child.get();
    39	        parameters.cast_target = expr;
    40	        bool all_constant = child.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR;
    41	        if (all_constant) {
    42	                // if the input is constant we only need to cast one value
    43	                if (ConstantVector::IsNull(child) && result.GetType().id() != LogicalTypeId::UNION) {
    44	                        // if the input is constant NULL the output is always constant NULL
    45	                        // ... except for unions, that are special
    46	                        ConstantVector::SetNull(result);
    47	                        return;
    48	                }
    49	                count = 1;
    50	        }
    51	        expr.bound_cast.Cast(child, result, count, parameters);
    52	        if (all_constant) {
    53	                result.SetVectorType(VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
    54	        }
    55	}
    56	
    57	} // namespace duckdb

   242	//===--------------------------------------------------------------------===//
   243	// string -> map casting
   244	//===--------------------------------------------------------------------===//
   245	static unique_ptr<FunctionLocalState> InitMapCastLocalState(CastLocalStateParameters &parameters) {
   246	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<MapBoundCastData>();
   247	        auto result = make_uniq<MapCastLocalState>();
   248	
   249	        if (cast_data.key_cast.HasInitLocalState()) {
   250	                CastLocalStateParameters child_params(parameters, cast_data.key_cast.GetCastData());
   251	                result->key_state = cast_data.key_cast.InitLocalState(child_params);
   252	        }
   253	        if (cast_data.value_cast.HasInitLocalState()) {
   254	                CastLocalStateParameters child_params(parameters, cast_data.value_cast.GetCastData());
   255	                result->value_state = cast_data.value_cast.InitLocalState(child_params);
   256	        }
   257	        return std::move(result);
   258	}
   259	
   260	bool VectorStringToMap::StringToNestedTypeCastLoop(const string_t *source_data, ValidityMask &source_mask,
   261	                                                   Vector &result, ValidityMask &result_mask, idx_t count,
   262	                                                   CastParameters &parameters, const SelectionVector *sel) {
   263	        idx_t total_elements = 0;
   264	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   265	                idx_t idx = i;
   266	                if (sel) {
   267	                        idx = sel->get_index(i);
   268	                }
   269	                if (!source_mask.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   270	                        continue;
   271	                }
   272	                total_elements += (VectorStringToMap::CountPartsMap(source_data[idx]) + 1) / 2;
   273	        }
   274	
   275	        Vector varchar_key_vector(LogicalType::VARCHAR, total_elements);
   276	        Vector varchar_val_vector(LogicalType::VARCHAR, total_elements);
   277	        auto child_key_data = FlatVector::GetDataMutable<string_t>(varchar_key_vector);
   278	        auto child_val_data = FlatVector::GetDataMutable<string_t>(varchar_val_vector);
   279	
   280	        ListVector::Reserve(result, total_elements);
   281	        ListVector::SetListSize(result, total_elements);
   282	        auto list_data = FlatVector::GetDataMutable<list_entry_t>(result);
   283	
   284	        VectorTryCastData vector_cast_data(result, parameters);
   285	        idx_t total = 0;
   286	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   287	                idx_t idx = i;
   288	                if (sel) {
   289	                        idx = sel->get_index(i);
   290	                }
   291	                if (!source_mask.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   292	                        result_mask.SetInvalid(i);
   293	                        continue;
   294	                }
   295	
   296	                list_data[i].offset = total;
   297	                if (!VectorStringToMap::SplitStringMap(source_data[idx], child_key_data, child_val_data, total,
   298	                                                       varchar_key_vector, varchar_val_vector)) {
   299	                        auto error = StringUtil::Format("Type VARCHAR with value '%s' can't be cast to the destination type %s",
   300	                                                        source_data[idx].GetString(), result.GetType().ToString());
   301	                        FlatVector::SetNull(result, i, true);
   302	                        HandleVectorCastError::Operation<string_t>(error, result_mask, i, vector_cast_data);
   303	                }
   304	                list_data[i].length = total - list_data[i].offset;
   305	        }
   306	        D_ASSERT(total_elements == total);
   307	
   308	        auto &result_key_child = MapVector::GetKeys(result);
   309	        auto &result_val_child = MapVector::GetValues(result);
   310	        auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<MapBoundCastData>();
   311	        auto &lstate = parameters.local_state->Cast<MapCastLocalState>();
   312	
   313	        CastParameters key_params(parameters, cast_data.key_cast.GetCastData(), lstate.key_state);
   314	        if (!cast_data.key_cast.Cast(varchar_key_vector, result_key_child, total_elements, key_params)) {
   315	                vector_cast_data.all_converted = false;
   316	        }
   317	        CastParameters val_params(parameters, cast_data.value_cast.GetCastData(), lstate.value_state);
   318	        if (!cast_data.value_cast.Cast(varchar_val_vector, result_val_child, total_elements, val_params)) {
   319	                vector_cast_data.all_converted = false;
   320	        }
   321	
   322	        if (!vector_cast_data.all_converted) {
   323	                auto &key_validity = FlatVector::ValidityMutable(result_key_child);
   324	                for (idx_t row_idx = 0; row_idx < count; row_idx++) {
   325	                        if (!result_mask.RowIsValid(row_idx)) {

   342	// string -> array casting
   343	//===--------------------------------------------------------------------===//
   344	bool VectorStringToArray::StringToNestedTypeCastLoop(const string_t *source_data, ValidityMask &source_mask,
   345	                                                     Vector &result, ValidityMask &result_mask, idx_t count,
   346	                                                     CastParameters &parameters, const SelectionVector *sel) {
   347	        idx_t array_size = ArrayType::GetSize(result.GetType());

   349	
   350	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
   351	                idx_t idx = i;
   352	                if (sel) {
   353	                        idx = sel->get_index(i);
   354	                }
   355	                if (!source_mask.RowIsValid(idx)) {
   356	                        continue;
   357	                }
   358	                auto str_array_size = VectorStringToList::CountPartsList(source_data[idx]);

   360	                        if (all_lengths_match) {
   361	                                all_lengths_match = false;

   363	                                                              ", the size of the array must match the destination type",

   366	                                        throw ConversionException(msg);
   367	                                }
   368	                                HandleCastError::AssignError(msg, parameters);
   369	                        }
   370	                        result_mask.SetInvalid(i);
   371	                }
   372	        }

unique_ptr<FunctionLocalState> MapBoundCastData::InitMapLocalState(CastLocalStateParameters &parameters) {
	auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<MapBoundCastData>();
	auto result = make_uniq<MapCastLocalState>();

	if (cast_data.key_cast.HasInitLocalState()) {
		CastLocalStateParameters child_params(parameters, cast_data.key_cast.GetCastData());
		result->key_state = cast_data.key_cast.InitLocalState(child_params);
	}
	if (cast_data.value_cast.HasInitLocalState()) {
		CastLocalStateParameters child_params(parameters, cast_data.value_cast.GetCastData());
		result->value_state = cast_data.value_cast.InitLocalState(child_params);
	}
	return std::move(result);
}

static bool MapToMapCast(Vector &source, Vector &result, idx_t count, CastParameters &parameters) {
	auto &cast_data = parameters.cast_data->Cast<MapBoundCastData>();
	auto &lstate = parameters.local_state->Cast<MapCastLocalState>();

	// only handle constant and flat vectors here for now
	if (source.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
		result.SetVectorType(source.GetVectorType());
		const bool is_null = ConstantVector::IsNull(source);
		ConstantVector::SetNull(result, is_null);

		if (!is_null) {
			auto ldata = ConstantVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
			auto tdata = ConstantVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(result);
			*tdata = *ldata;
		}
	} else {
		source.Flatten(count);
		result.SetVectorType(VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR);
		FlatVector::SetValidity(result, FlatVector::ValidityMutable(source));

		auto ldata = FlatVector::GetData<list_entry_t>(source);
		auto tdata = FlatVector::Writer<list_entry_t>(result, count);
		for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
			tdata[i] = ldata[i];
		}
	}

	auto source_size = ListVector::GetListSize(source);
	ListVector::Reserve(result, source_size);
	ListVector::SetListSize(result, source_size);

	auto &source_keys = MapVector::GetKeys(source);
	auto &source_values = MapVector::GetValues(source);
	auto &result_keys = MapVector::GetKeys(result);
	auto &result_values = MapVector::GetValues(result);

	CastParameters key_parameters(parameters, cast_data.key_cast.GetCastData(), lstate.key_state);
	bool keys_succeeded = cast_data.key_cast.Cast(source_keys, result_keys, source_size, key_parameters);
	CastParameters value_parameters(parameters, cast_data.value_cast.GetCastData(), lstate.value_state);
	bool values_succeeded = cast_data.value_cast.Cast(source_values, result_values, source_size, value_parameters);

	if (!keys_succeeded) {
		auto result_entries = result.Values<list_entry_t>(count);
		auto key_validity = result_keys.Validity(source_size);
		for (idx_t row_idx = 0; row_idx < count; row_idx++) {
			auto map_entry = result_entries[row_idx];
			if (!map_entry.IsValid()) {
				continue;
			}
			auto &map_list = map_entry.GetValue();
			for (idx_t child_idx = 0; child_idx < map_list.length; child_idx++) {
				if (!key_validity.IsValid(map_list.offset + child_idx)) {
					FlatVector::SetNull(result, row_idx, true);
					break;
				}
			}
		}
	}

	return keys_succeeded && values_succeeded;
}

     1	#include "duckdb/common/vector/constant_vector.hpp"
     2	#include "duckdb/common/vector/array_vector.hpp"
     3	#include "duckdb/common/vector/flat_vector.hpp"
     4	#include "duckdb/common/vector/list_vector.hpp"
     5	#include "duckdb/common/vector/struct_vector.hpp"
     6	
     7	namespace duckdb {
     8	
     9	void ConstantVector::SetNull(Vector &vector) {
    10	        auto &type = vector.GetType();
    11	        auto internal_type = type.InternalType();
    12	        // ensure the buffer supports validity masks
    13	        // buffers like SequenceBuffer/DictionaryBuffer do not have validity masks
    14	        bool needs_new_buffer = !vector.GetBufferRef();
    15	        if (!needs_new_buffer) {
    16	                auto buffer_type = vector.Buffer().GetBufferType();
    17	                needs_new_buffer =
    18	                    (buffer_type != VectorBufferType::STANDARD_BUFFER && buffer_type != VectorBufferType::STRUCT_BUFFER &&
    19	                     buffer_type != VectorBufferType::ARRAY_BUFFER && buffer_type != VectorBufferType::LIST_BUFFER &&
    20	                     buffer_type != VectorBufferType::STRING_BUFFER);
    21	        }
    22	        if (needs_new_buffer) {
    23	                if (internal_type == PhysicalType::STRUCT) {
    24	                        vector.SetBuffer(make_buffer<VectorStructBuffer>(type, 1));
    25	                } else if (internal_type == PhysicalType::ARRAY) {
    26	                        vector.SetBuffer(make_buffer<VectorArrayBuffer>(type, 1));
    27	                } else if (internal_type == PhysicalType::LIST) {
    28	                        vector.SetBuffer(VectorBuffer::CreateConstantVector(type));
    29	                } else {
    30	                        vector.SetBuffer(VectorBuffer::CreateConstantVector(internal_type));
    31	                }
    32	        }
    33	        vector.SetVectorType(VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
    34	        SetNull(vector, true);
    35	}
    36	
    37	void ConstantVector::SetNull(Vector &vector, bool is_null) {
    38	        D_ASSERT(vector.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
    39	        auto &validity = vector.BufferMutable().GetValidityMask();
    40	        validity.Set(0, !is_null);
    41	        if (is_null) {
    42	                auto &type = vector.GetType();
    43	                auto internal_type = type.InternalType();
    44	                if (internal_type == PhysicalType::STRUCT) {
    45	                        // set all child entries to null as well
    46	                        auto &entries = StructVector::GetEntries(vector);
    47	                        for (auto &entry : entries) {
    48	                                entry.SetVectorType(VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
    49	                                ConstantVector::SetNull(entry, is_null);
    50	                        }

    37	void ConstantVector::SetNull(Vector &vector, bool is_null) {
    38	        D_ASSERT(vector.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
    39	        auto &validity = vector.BufferMutable().GetValidityMask();
    40	        validity.Set(0, !is_null);
    41	        if (is_null) {
    42	                auto &type = vector.GetType();
    43	                auto internal_type = type.InternalType();
    44	                if (internal_type == PhysicalType::STRUCT) {
    45	                        // set all child entries to null as well
    46	                        auto &entries = StructVector::GetEntries(vector);
    47	                        for (auto &entry : entries) {
    48	                                entry.SetVectorType(VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR);
    49	                                ConstantVector::SetNull(entry, is_null);
    50	                        }
    51	                } else if (internal_type == PhysicalType::ARRAY) {
    52	                        auto &child = ArrayVector::GetEntry(vector);
    53	                        D_ASSERT(child.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR ||
    54	                                 child.GetVectorType() == VectorType::FLAT_VECTOR);
    55	                        auto array_size = ArrayType::GetSize(type);
    56	                        if (child.GetVectorType() == VectorType::CONSTANT_VECTOR) {
    57	                                D_ASSERT(array_size == 1);
    58	                                ConstantVector::SetNull(child, is_null);
    59	                        } else {
    60	                                for (idx_t i = 0; i < array_size; i++) {
    61	                                        FlatVector::SetNull(child, i, is_null);
    62	                                }
    63	                        }
    64	                }
    65	        }
    66	}
    67	
    68	const SelectionVector *ConstantVector::ZeroSelectionVector(idx_t count, SelectionVector &owned_sel) {
    69	        if (count <= STANDARD_VECTOR_SIZE) {
    70	                return ConstantVector::ZeroSelectionVector();
    71	        }
    72	        owned_sel.Initialize(count);
    73	        for (idx_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    74	                owned_sel.set_index(i, 0);
    75	        }
    76	        return &owned_sel;
    77	}
    78	
    79	void ConstantVector::Reference(Vector &vector, const Vector &source, idx_t position, idx_t count) {
    80	        auto &source_type = source.GetType();
    81	        switch (source_type.InternalType()) {
    82	        case PhysicalType::LIST: {

    85	                auto entry = entries[position];
    86
